title: SOP/ENL/02/1.0 Semi-static Mussel Bioconcentration Test
author: Azevedo, Sofia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The purpose of this SOP is to document the procedures of the semi-static bioconcentration test with mussels. The objective of this test is to evaluate the bioconcentration of nanomaterials in mussels in a semi-static exposure.
steps_raw: The purpose of this SOP is to document the procedures of the semi-static bioconcentration test with mussels. The objective of this test is to evaluate the bioconcentration of nanomaterials in mussels in a semi-static exposure.
